final:
module top_module(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input signal,
    output reg [31:0] output_reg
);reg signal_d;
always @(posedge clk) begin
  signal_d <= signal ;
  end

  always @(posedge clk) begin
  if (reset) begin output_reg <= 1 ; end else if (signal_d && !signal) begin output_reg <= {32{1'b1}} ; end
  end

endmodule
